title: Versioning Strategy
proposed_decision: Adopt semantic-release for automated versioning and changelog
rationale: Leverage Conventional Commits to cut manual release overhead and reduce errors

title: Release Cadence
proposed_decision: Adopt a weekly release train on Thursdays 17:00 UTC
rationale: Predictability for downstream teams; aligns with incident window

title: Security Scanning
proposed_decision: Enable CodeQL by default in GitHub Actions
rationale: Ensure code scanning runs on PR and main; gate high-severity findings

title: Documentation Publishing
proposed_decision: Publish Docusaurus docs to internal GitHub Pages
rationale: Make onboarding and architecture docs accessible to all teams

title: CLI Index Caching
proposed_decision: Introduce Redis caching for CLI index updates
rationale: Reduce cold-start latency when fetching large registries

title: Telemetry
proposed_decision: Add OpenTelemetry traces around CLI operations
rationale: Improve observability and help pinpoint performance regressions

title: Feature Flags Policy
proposed_decision: Document feature flag lifecycle and naming

title: Build Scripts
proposed_decision: Migrate remaining shell scripts to Node-based npm scripts
